prestazioni: Engine: CZDA 1.8L TSI (EA888 Gen3) with a custom APR Stage 3+ turbo kit featuring a Garrett GTX3071R Gen II turbocharger, upgraded high-flow fuel injectors (Bosch 0261500431), and a 3.5-bar MAP sensor for 380+ HP and 450 Nm torque on 98 RON fuel. Paired with a DSG TCU tune from DSG Solutions for optimized shift points and launch control.

Suspension: KW Clubsport 3-way adjustable coilovers with 8-position rebound damping, adjustable top mounts, and helper springs for precise handling. Front and rear anti-roll bars upgraded to H&R 24mm (front) and 22mm (rear) adjustable units to reduce body roll during aggressive cornering.

Braking: AP Racing 6-piston CP8370 front brake calipers with 380mm two-piece rotors (floating, slotted) and Ferodo DS2500 pads. Rear braking upgraded to Brembo 4-piston calipers with 345mm rotors and Ferodo DS3000 pads. Braided stainless steel brake lines from Goodridge for improved pedal feel.
estetica: Aero: Custom 3D-printed carbon fiber front splitter from Maxton Design (Touran-specific, R-Line compatible) with integrated canards. Rear diffuser from RevoZport, paired with a carbon fiber roof spoiler from Oettinger for reduced lift and aggressive stance.

Wheels: BBS FI-R 19x8.5 ET35 forged wheels in matte black with 235/35 R19 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires for optimal grip. Wheel spacers from H&R (15mm front, 20mm rear) to achieve flush fitment without fender modifications.

Exterior: Full Respray in Volkswagen Oryx White Pearl with a 3-stage PPF (XPEL Ultimate Plus) for protection. Custom R-Line badges in gloss black with red accents, and LED side markers from Osram with sequential turn signals. Lower grille replaced with a carbon fiber mesh from Forge Motorsport.
